decisions.title: the singularity is nearer
decisions.reason: George Hotz's philosophical piece on AI as 'social crime' and 'reflection of demonic desires.' Short (35 lines), more poetic than technical. Existing entities/george-hotz.md (299 lines) already covers his AI philosophy extensively. Reference-level addition to existing timeline.
decisions.reason_ja: George Hotzの哲学的エッセイ：AIを「社会的犯罪」「 demonic desiresの反映」と論じる。短文（35行）、詩的で技術的でない。既存entities/george-hotz.md（299行）がAI哲学を既に広くカバー。タイムラインへの参照レベル追記。

decisions.title: You Got Faster. Your Company Didn't.
decisions.reason: Insightful essay on AI productivity paradox: individual speed gains don't translate to organizational speed due to trust deficit in AI-generated docs/code. 'Ponzi scheme' of pushing reading work to reviewers. AI-adjacent commentary, no specific wiki target page.
decisions.reason_ja: AI生産性のパラドックスに関する洞察的エッセイ：個人の速度向上がAI生成ドキュメント/コードへの信頼欠如により組織の速度に転換されない。レビューへの読み作業の「ポンジースキーム」。AI関連だが、特定のwikiターゲットページなし。
decisions.body_excerpt:

decisions.title: 3 Composio alternatives to consider in 2026
decisions.reason: Agent tooling landscape: Composio vs Merge Agent Handler vs Arcade vs Workato. Composio May 2026 security incident (API keys exfiltrated). Useful for agent-integration-platform concept page if created. Merge's marketing content but contains factual competitive intelligence.
decisions.reason_ja: エージェントツールの景色：Composio vs Merge Agent Handler vs Arcade vs Workato。Composio 2026年5月のセキュリティインシデント（APIキー流出）。agent-integration-platform概念ページ作成時に有用。Mergeのマーケティングコンテンツだが、事実的な競合インテリジェンスを含む。

decisions.title: Arcade vs Composio: when to choose one over the other
decisions.reason: Detailed Composio vs Arcade comparison: Composio (1000+ apps, agent-native primitives, May 2026 security incident) vs Arcade (MCP runtime, 8000+ tools, 43 first-party connectors, deployment flexibility). Useful reference for agent tooling landscape.
